set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { adharNumber: attributes.queryParams.adharNumber, bankName: attributes.queryParams.bankName }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

when.expression: #[vars.inputPayload.address == null or vars.inputPayload.mobileNumber == null or vars.inputPayload.FullName == null or vars.inputPayload.dateOfBirth == null or vars.inputPayload.email == null]

snowflake:select.doc:name: verify account
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT c.ACCOUNTNUMBER, i.IFSC_CODE, i.BRANCH_NAME FROM BANK_IFSC_MASTER i LEFT JOIN BANK_CUSTOMER_DATA c ON ( c.EMAIL = :email OR c.DATEOFBIRTH = :dateOfBirth OR c.ADHARNUMBER = :adharNumber ) WHERE UPPER(i.BANK_NAME) = UPPER(:bankName);
snowflake:select.snowflake:input-parameters: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "email": vars.inputPayload.email, "dateOfBirth": vars.inputPayload.dateOfBirth, "adharNumber": vars.inputAttributes.adharNumber, "bankName": vars.inputAttributes.bankName }]

choice.doc:name: verify the customer detalies sent by user if the customer is new then route the request to the insert flow

flow-ref.doc:name: calling already account existed email implimentation flow
flow-ref.name: post_account_create_account_already_existedFlow

logger.doc:name: After already existed email implementation flow

ee:transform.doc:name: Account deatiles aready existed with requested input data

logger.doc:name: The customer account is already existed in DB
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account is already existed in DB--------------------------#[payload]

logger.doc:name: Reponse recieved from auto accountNumber creation flow
